home.intro: Official results and historical frequency analysis. Pick a lottery:

predictor.subtitulo: A fun extra to play with the stats. It has no effect on the draw.
predictor.hintCalientes: Random combination weighted toward the most frequent numbers · entertainment only
predictor.hintFrios: Random combination weighted toward the least frequent numbers · entertainment only

stats.calientesDesc: The ones drawn most often historically
stats.friosDesc: The ones that have gone longest without appearing
stats.mapaCalorDesc: Intensity by how many times each number has been drawn historically

disclaimer.compacto: Historical statistical analysis · each draw is independent · does not predict results
disclaimer.independiente: Each draw is an independent, random event. Frequencies are a historical curiosity, not a prediction: a "hot" number is no more likely to come up. This tool does not improve your chances of winning.
disclaimer.juegoResponsable: Playing the lottery means spending with no guaranteed return. Only bet what you can afford to lose. If gambling becomes a problem, seek professional support. 18+ only.

genFecha.sub: Based on your date of birth
genFecha.label: Your date of birth
genFecha.placeholder: Pick a date and tap generate

cookies.banner: We use our own and third-party cookies for analytics and, where applicable, advertising. You can accept or reject them.
